condition: missing lineage OR mode OR db_version OR n_busco
claim_constraint: Do not summarize BUSCO percentages without lineage+mode+db identity
action: report lineage+mode+db_version with every BUSCO number

condition: lineage differs between assemblies under comparison
claim_constraint: Do not compare BUSCO percentages directly across lineages
action: rerun same lineage OR report each separately with lineage label

condition: high C with high D in haplotype-resolved assembly (D>20%)
claim_constraint: Phased haplotype duplication is not automatically a defect
action: check ploidy/subgenome context before calling it over-duplication
source: hifiasm primary docs / quinoa V2 hap1 D=96.4 baseline

condition: missing k OR read_db_type OR coverage
claim_constraint: Do not state QV without read database provenance

condition: read_db_type differs between assemblies under comparison
claim_constraint: Do not rank QV across protocols (illumina_pcrfree vs hifi vs hybrid)
action: harmonize read_db OR report each separately

condition: read_db built from same reads used to assemble (HiFi-on-HiFi)
claim_constraint: QV is not independent of the assembly under this protocol
action: prefer orthogonal short-read truth set; caveat if reusing

claim_constraint: Do not use LAI grade as quality claim when LTR content below applicability

condition: LAI used as cross-organism quality grade
claim_constraint: LAI grades (draft/reference/gold) are not directly portable across taxa
Gene-space complete does not imply repeat-space complete
action: phrase as "gene-space complete; repeat-space draft/reference boundary"
source: Ou et al. 2018 LAI / orthogonality argument

condition: contig_N50 vs scaffold_N50 mixed across assemblies
claim_constraint: Do not compare continuity numbers without labeling contig vs scaffold

condition: scaffold_N50 reported after Hi-C without misjoin validation
claim_constraint: Scaffolding can inflate N50 via false joins
action: require contact-map heatmap review OR pre/post comparison

claim_constraint: Do not make population association claim from pilot or partial count
action: mark as exploratory until full count + matrix + asso completes

condition: hit overlaps SD region OR centromere mask
claim_constraint: Causal phrasing not supported when hit lies in SD or centromere
action: require unique mappability evidence OR exclude region

condition: high-confidence claim with single-caller support only
claim_constraint: Do not call SV high-confidence without orthogonal caller support
